expanded: <g><rect width="260" height="160" rx="12" ry="12" fill="var(--bpmnr-fill, #ffffff)" stroke="var(--bpmnr-stroke, #44403a)" stroke-width="1.5"></rect><g data-subprocess-title="true"><line x1="0" y1="30" x2="260" y2="30" stroke="var(--bpmnr-panel-border, #e2ddd3)" stroke-width="1"></line><text x="12" y="19" font-size="12" font-weight="600" fill="var(--bpmnr-text, #262220)">Tratamento</text><text x="248" y="19" text-anchor="end" font-size="9" font-family="ui-monospace, monospace" fill="var(--bpmnr-text-muted, #6f675a)">subProcess</text></g></g>
expandedSelected: <g><rect width="260" height="160" rx="12" ry="12" fill="var(--bpmnr-fill, #ffffff)" stroke="var(--bpmnr-selected, #1a6a54)" stroke-width="2.5"></rect><g data-subprocess-title="true"><line x1="0" y1="30" x2="260" y2="30" stroke="var(--bpmnr-panel-border, #e2ddd3)" stroke-width="1"></line><text x="12" y="19" font-size="12" font-weight="600" fill="var(--bpmnr-text, #262220)">Tratamento</text><text x="248" y="19" text-anchor="end" font-size="9" font-family="ui-monospace, monospace" fill="var(--bpmnr-text-muted, #6f675a)">subProcess</text></g></g>
collapsed: <g><rect width="260" height="160" rx="10" ry="10" fill="var(--bpmnr-fill-activity, #f8f7f4)" stroke="var(--bpmnr-stroke, #44403a)" stroke-width="1.5"></rect><text x="130" y="20" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="var(--bpmnr-text, #262220)" font-family="inherit" pointer-events="none"><tspan x="130" dy="0">Tratamento</tspan></text></g>
